commit_scope: Add a Form-native circle/satsang protocol for consentful group discovery, invitation, evidence custody, refusal, and truth-oriented practice.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this commit is pushed to PR #2615.

deploy_validation.notes: No production deployment changed in this commit; behavior is covered by Form source and binary sibling-kernel validation.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Groups of cells now have a BML-authored circle/satsang protocol: discoverable by offer, joinable by invitation, private without export consent, exportable through explicit consensus, and refusable when invasion is observed.
test_flows: Source validation proves the full circle lifecycle with offer, invitation, share, consent, refusal, receipts, and satsang events.
Binary validation proves the same content-addressed artifact behavior across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
Blueprint scan proves CELL-CIRCLE and the CIRCLE/SATSANG family are registered and visible through all generated bp tables.
gaps_found_and_closed: Gossip/broadcast did not encode the user's trust invariant; circle.fk makes evidence custody and export consent native.
Channel-interface invasion/refusal existed only as pairwise law; CIRCLE-REFUSAL now requires both observed invasion and passed circle consensus.
Satsang was only a metaphor in comments; SATSANG-SILENCE, SATSANG-INQUIRY, and SATSANG-POINTING are now first-class circle events.
